docs.title: MCAB: Monte Carlo Simulations for A/B Testing
docs.text: A Python toolkit to design and validate A/B experiments via simulation: estimate power, find MDE, and control type-I error. Supports iid & ratio metrics, linearization, CUPED/CUPAC variance reduction, bootstrap tests, permutation tests, multiple-testing corrections, and AA/AB benchmarking.

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
You can install the package directly from PyPI:

pip install mcab

Docs & Tutorial

docs.text:

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from scipy import stats

Lets get started!
